summary: Iteration 34 — Security Dashboard + Trendyol Q&A days_back + Trendyol reviews scrape. Backend 29/29 PASSED, Frontend full UI flow verified (8 KPI cards, locked-user list, filter widgets, sidebar link under Entegrasyonlar). All 6 /api/admin/security/* endpoints work; auth guards correct (no token → 401, customer token → 403). Trendyol reviews scrape input validation correct; questions sync date-range params (startDate/endDate Unix ms, days_back) verified by code-review.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with success:false when email missing instead of 422/400. Acceptable but inconsistent with FastAPI conventions.
Use query parameters instead of JSON body — non-standard; a JSON body alternative would be more REST-friendly. Pre-existing, not new in iter34.

action_items: Optional: standardise auth endpoints to accept JSON body (not query params) for register/login — improves OpenAPI docs and curl ergonomics.
Optional: change /api/admin/security/unlock-user to return 400 (not 200/success:false) when 'email' is missing for HTTP-correctness.
critical_code_review_comments: security_dashboard.py:_iso_ago — uses ISO-string compare which is fine since `created_at` is also ISO-string. Indexing on `created_at` (added in server.py:118-125) ensures fast range scans. Good.
security_dashboard.py:unlock_user — best-effort audit log inside try/except; never raises. Properly $unset's failed_attempts + first_failed_at + locked_until. Good.
security_dashboard.py:recent_events — does not project out `_id`; relies on `{'_id': 0}` projection in find. Confirmed: `db.auth_audit_logs.find(q, {"_id": 0})` — correct.
integrations.py:3567 sync_trendyol_questions — startDate/endDate Unix ms params now passed; days_back clamped to [1, 365] via `max(1, min(days_back, 365))`. Correct.

integrations.py:3744 scrape_trendyol_reviews — proper URL validation (trendyol.com check + `-p-(\d+)` regex). Inserts only rating>=min_rating. After insert, recomputes products.rating + review_count via aggregation. Good.
integrations.py:3877 scrape-bulk — slices items[:50]; calls inner scrape per-item; collects per-item ok/error. Solid.

Concern (minor): `scrape_trendyol_reviews` uses `User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0` which Trendyol may anti-bot. Production may hit 403/429. Suggest cycling UAs or using authenticated supplier API if TY exposes one for reviews.
seed_data_creation: Test creates throwaway users prefixed with test_lock_* and test_iter34_cust_* via /api/auth/register. Cleanup performed at end (5 users deleted). admin@facette.com is NOT touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter34 endpoints validated. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration34_security_dashboard.py is reusable for regression. Note: lockout returns HTTP 429 (not 423) with 'Çok fazla başarısız deneme' message — tests assert 401/403/423/429. Trendyol public.trendyol.com is reachable from preview container (test_valid_url_network_blocked_500 passed without 500). The sidebar 'Güvenlik Paneli' link is inside an 'Entegrasyonlar' dropdown that must be opened by hover/click before the link is visible — tests handle this. Frontend KPI cards use data-testid='security-card-{label}' (Turkish label) — 8 confirmed.
